titleStmt.title: SII 39.197: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 197. (A.R. No. 197 of 1916.) TIRUPPUKKUḺI, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. VIJAYARAGHAVAPERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN VIJAYAGAṆḌAGOPĀLADĒVA-30TH YEAR (1280 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers a gift of lands located in Kaṭṭanūr by Madurāntakap-pottappichchōḻaṉ Vīragaṇḍagopālaṉ for the supply of food offering and other sacred services to the temple. Taxes like Sekkukaḍamai, Taṟiyiṟai, Taṭṭārbāṭṭam, Inavari, E7rimiṉbāṭṭam, Poṉvari, Kudiraivari etc., were exempted from the gifted land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vicaiyakaṇṭakopāla tevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 vatu tulā nāyaṟṟu pūrvvepakṣattu saptamiyum ve
ḷḷik kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattut tāmaṟ koṭṭattuttāmar nāṭṭut tiruppa
ti tiruppuṭkuḻi nāyaṉār vicaiyarākavap perumāḷukku maturāntakap pottappic coḻaṉ virakaṇṭakopāla tevaṉeṉ nāyaṉār vicaiya
kaṇṭakopālatevar Irupattoṉpatāvatu cittirai viṣuvile Innāyaṉārkkut tirunāṭpaṭikkum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭikkum palapaṇi niman
tattukkum Utakam paṇṇi Aruḷiṉa kaṭṭaṉūr paḻavakaramum puttakaram Iṟaiyili tevatāṉa nikkik kiḻpāṟkellai Ampi Akarattāṉ El
laikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pūttoṇṭaṉpaṭṭu Ellaikkum Oṭippākkattāṉ Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai putiya
Akarattār Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai mīpārk kellaikku teṟkum Āka Inta nāṟpāṟ kellaikku naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam muppatāva
tu Aṟpaci mātam mutal naṉcey puṉceykkaṭamai Āyam puṟakkalaṉai cekkukkaṭamai taṟiyiṟai taṭṭār pāṭṭam Iṉavari Erimiṉ pāṭṭam
poṉvari kutiraivari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa sarvvamanyamāka cantirātittavarai celvatāka cilālekai paṇ
ṇikkuṭutteṉ maturāntakap pottappic coḻaṉ virakaṇṭakopāla tevaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 39.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
